title: MarineTraffic Vessel Position
description: A single AIS-derived vessel position record as returned by the MarineTraffic AIS API (PS01–PS08 / MTA030AD families). Field semantics match the MarineTraffic AIS data dictionary at https://servicedocs.marinetraffic.com/.

MMSI.description: Maritime Mobile Service Identity — 9-digit AIS-broadcast vessel identifier.

IMO.description: International Maritime Organization number — permanent 7-digit vessel identifier (when known).

SHIPNAME.description: Vessel name as broadcast via AIS Message 5.

CALLSIGN.description: Radio call sign assigned to the vessel.

SHIPTYPE.description: AIS-coded ship type (numeric range 0–99 per ITU-R M.1371).

LAT.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (-90 to 90).

LON.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (-180 to 180).

SPEED.description: Speed Over Ground in tenths of a knot (raw AIS value); divide by 10 for SOG in knots.

COURSE.description: Course Over Ground in degrees from true north (0–359).

HEADING.description: True heading in degrees (0–359). 511 means "not available".

STATUS.description: AIS navigational status code (0=under way using engine, 1=at anchor, 5=moored, ...).

DESTINATION.description: Free-text destination as broadcast via AIS Message 5.

ETA_AIS.description: Estimated Time of Arrival as broadcast via AIS.

ETA_PREDICTED.description: MarineTraffic predictive ETA computed from voyage forecasting.

DSRC.description: Data source — TER (terrestrial AIS receiver) or SAT (satellite AIS).

TIMESTAMP.description: UTC timestamp of the AIS position report.

DRAUGHT.description: Reported draught in tenths of a metre.

CURRENT_PORT.description: Resolved current-port name if the vessel is currently in port.

NEXT_PORT_UNLOCODE.description: UN/LOCODE for the predicted next port.
